layout_note: Standard (non-transposed) Schedule A grid, filled by hand/typed with X marks. Block B value columns A-M and Block D amount columns I-XII are printed over a heavy grey stipple/shading that partially obscures which cell holds the X; asset names, owner column, EIF, income-type and transaction are legible. Group/portfolio subheaders appear as bold rows with no marks. Block B columns: A=None, B=$1-$1,000, C=$1,001-$15,000, D=$15,001-$50,000, E=$50,001-$100,000, F=$100,001-$250,000, G=$250,001-$500,000, H=$500,001-$1,000,000, I=$1,000,001-$5,000,000, J=$5,000,001-$25,000,000, K=$25,000,001-$50,000,000, L=Over $50,000,000, M=Spouse/DC Asset over $1,000,000. Block D columns: I=None, II=$1-$200, III=$201-$1,000, IV=$1,001-$2,500, V=$2,501-$5,000, VI=$5,001-$15,000, VII=$15,001-$50,000, VIII=$50,001-$100,000, IX=$100,001-$1,000,000, X=$1,000,001-$5,000,000, XI=Over $5,000,000, XII=Spouse/DC Asset with income over $1,000,000.

uncertainties.note: Block B value columns printed over heavy grey shading; exact X column is low-confidence for every row on this page
Block D amount columns printed over heavy grey shading; exact X column is low-confidence for every row
SP-owned NY condo under Ritu Ahuja Rev. Trust; income type could be NONE and value/amount could fall in the Spouse/DC (M/XII) catch-all columns rather than a numeric bucket
written in the Other Type of Income column; interpreted as partnership income; transaction column shows S (sale)
